title: Anthropic Just Confirmed It: The 2028 AI Warning Is Real
summary: The video presents claims that Anthropic executives have outlined a 2028 timeline for recursive self-improvement in AI, citing statements from Jack Clark about Claude versions, MirrorCode's autonomous software development, and GPT-5.6 Sol's capabilities. It frames AI-assisted AI development as a major inflection point in the competitive landscape.
writeup: The video relays claims that Anthropic executives have sketched a 2028 timeline for recursive self-improvement, drawing on statements attributed to Jack Clark about Claude versions, references to MirrorCode's autonomous software development, and the capabilities of a system labeled GPT-5.6 Sol. It treats AI systems assisting in their own development as a competitive inflection point. The framing connects recursive self-improvement, AI-assisted development, and test-time compute as the mechanisms behind the projected acceleration.
